page_content:
flowchart LR
    %% Roadmap-complete: observability stack (conceptual)

    subgraph Apps[Applications]
        GW[Gateway]
        SVC[Services\n(auth,user,product,order,payment,...)]
        FE[Frontend\n(browser)]
    end

    subgraph Telemetry[Instrumentation]
        OTELSDK[OpenTelemetry SDK\n(traces/metrics/logs)]
        RUM[Frontend RUM\n(optional)]
    end

    subgraph Pipeline[Collection + Routing]
        OTELCOL[OpenTelemetry Collector]
    end

    subgraph Backends[Storage/Backends]
        PROM[Prometheus\n(metrics)]
        LOKI[Loki\n(logs)]
        JAEGER[Jaeger\n(traces)]
    end

    subgraph Visualize[Visualization + Alerting]
        GRAF[Grafana]
        ALERT[Alertmanager\n(optional)]
    end

    GW --> OTELSDK
    SVC --> OTELSDK
    FE --> RUM

    OTELSDK --> OTELCOL
    RUM --> OTELCOL

    OTELCOL --> PROM
    OTELCOL --> LOKI
    OTELCOL --> JAEGER

OTELSDK --> OTELCOL
    RUM --> OTELCOL

    OTELCOL --> PROM
    OTELCOL --> LOKI
    OTELCOL --> JAEGER

    PROM --> GRAF
    LOKI --> GRAF
    JAEGER --> GRAF
    PROM --> ALERT
